Interview prep: DNN architecture, layers, neurons, activation functions, overfitting, backpropagation, optimizer choice, batch vs online learning covered.
Activation functions introduce non-linearity, enable backprop (differentiable), sparsity (ReLU), normalize outputs (softmax), thresholding.
GLMs extend linear models for non-normal distributions (Poisson, binomial); link function relates predictor to response; regularization prevents overfitting.
Entropy measures impurity in decision trees; information gain = entropy reduction after split; feature with highest info gain chosen for split.

20-gallon tank with live plants; water cloudiness last week; had algae bloom on March 10 (fixed with water changes, reduced feeding); investigating causes.
Maintaining clarity: regular 10-15% weekly water changes, monitor ammonia/nitrite/nitrate, maintain 1-2W/gal lighting, adjust filter outlets for circulation.
Added Java Moss and Anacharis around March 1; had success with plants; want to expand; live plants help control algae and provide natural environment.
Live plant care: provide 1-2W/gal lighting, monitor pH/temp/hardness, fertilize with iron/potassium/nitrogen, regular pruning, good circulation, nutrient-rich substrate.
NKVD methods: purges (1930s), Gulag system, secret police surveillance network, media censorship; used informants to identify supposed enemies of state.
Some escaped Gulag but rare; Vasily Mishin escaped 1952 via tunnel after arrested 1949 on espionage charges; most escapes failed or led to severe punishment.
